prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade utilizing a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (S36B44T4 engine code) with billet compressor wheel, 76mm inducer, and 106mm exducer, paired with a **TurboSmart Race Port 45mm wastegate** and **Precision Turbo 7675 ball-bearing center housing** for optimized spool and 850whp capability on E85 fuel. Custom **MMP Inconel 900°C-rated turbo manifold** with equal-length runners and **ARP Custom Age 625+ studs** to prevent boost leaks under sustained 2.5-bar pressure.

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **Bosch Motorsport 1050cc high-impedance injectors**, **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors**, and **Plex Tuning Knock Monitor** for real-time cylinder pressure analysis. **Ferrita Racing 3.5-inch titanium downpipe** with **GESI 400-cell catalytic converters** for emissions compliance while maintaining 90% flow efficiency. **MCS 4-way adjustable coilovers** with **Eibach ERS 1400N/mm helper springs** and **Ohlins TTX46ML dampers** for Touring-specific weight distribution (55:45 F/R).

**Drexler Motorsport 3-plate carbon clutch** with **Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel delete** and **PPG 80W-140 LSD fluid** for the **ZF 8HP76X 8-speed M Steptronic transmission**. **Gintani 4-inch aluminum driveshaft** with **CVX Racing carbon-fiber half-shafts** to handle 1,000Nm torque. **Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers** with **380mm CCM-R rotors** and **Ferodo DS3000 pads** for 1.2g deceleration from 200km/h.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** with **custom 3D-printed ABS fender flares** (2.5-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear) to accommodate **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 R20 front, 305/25 R21 rear)** on **BBS FI-R 10.5x20 and 12x21 forged wheels** with **HRE FlowForm centers**. **Vorsteiner VRT-900 carbon fiber roof** with **3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl overlay** for weight reduction and aerodynamic stability at 280km/h.

**Eventuri G9X carbon fiber front splitter** with **custom aluminum canards** and **M Performance carbon fiber side skirts** modified with **3D-printed Gurney flaps** for 120kg downforce at 200km/h. **Akrapovic Evolution titanium exhaust system** with **dual 100mm carbon fiber tips** and **valvetronic delete** for a 3,200rpm crackle tune. **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** with **Osram 5500K laser diodes** and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** for DRL functionality.

**Recaro SPG XL carbon fiber seats** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** and **custom MCS roll cage** (FIA 8862-2009 certified) integrated into the **BMW M Performance carbon fiber rear spoiler** (extended 3 inches for Touring-specific aero balance). **Custom matte Nardo Grey wrap** with **Gyeon Ceramic Coating** and **3M Scotchgard PPF** on high-impact zones (front bumper, mirrors, rocker panels).
